name: Seven Brothers
tagline: Samoan family-run cafe in Kahuku serving hearty food and solid coffee near the shrimp trucks.
mustOrder: iced mocha — thick and sweet, fuels the drive home
any plate lunch with a drip coffee — full local experience
parking: Free lot in Kahuku town center
talkStory: Seven Brothers is named because there are literally seven brothers running it. It's a Samoan family operation and the portions are massive. The coffee is simple but good — you're here for the full vibe. Right in Kahuku town near the famous shrimp trucks. If you're doing a North Shore loop, this is a legit stop for both food and caffeine. Aloha spirit is strong here.
